title: 宝塚記念の後に・さあ、コックピットへ

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: If we're done here, I'm heading back to campus.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Gasp... How did I do, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I've improved a lot, right? I'm much faster now.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Thanks! ♪ I really felt like myself today. ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I wasn't about to have my flight path
altered by anyone else on the track! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Now then! I've secured our next target! It's...
